name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: At 4831 Jonesboro Rd, Forest Park, GA 30297, Cash America Pawn can be reached at +1 404-363-0199.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international operator of pawn stores. Founded and scaled to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers, the company has built a network of more than 3,300 retail pawn locations across 29 U.S. states, Washington D.C., the United Kingdom, and Latin America (including Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company also operates AFF, a subsidiary providing lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through over 15,000 merchant partner locations nationwide.

FirstCash's core business model centers on pawn loans secured by pledged personal property—non-recourse loans where customers pledge items of value as collateral. Beyond lending, FirstCash operates retail stores that buy and sell jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments, and other merchandise. The company also provides specialized services including gold and precious metal buying, layaway programs (with 10% down payments), and retail resale. Their stores function as both lending hubs and discount retail destinations.

What distinguishes FirstCash from independent pawn shops is its scale, institutional infrastructure, and geographic reach. With approximately 22,000 employees and inclusion in the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, FirstCash operates as a publicly traded, professionally managed enterprise rather than a local operator. This corporate structure provides consistent policies, technology infrastructure, and standardized processes across locations, though it may lack the personalized negotiation typical of independent pawn shops.

FirstCash fills a specific niche in consumer finance: providing immediate cash access through collateral-based lending for consumers without access to traditional credit. The pawn loan model appeals to those needing emergency cash without credit checks or approval processes. However, customers should understand that pawn loans are not credit-building (they don't report to credit bureaus), and failure to reclaim pledged items results in permanent loss of those assets. Interest rates and terms vary by state regulation, and retail markups on sold merchandise can be substantial.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, and Latin America provides convenient access to pawn services
Non-recourse pawn loans mean no credit check required and no impact on credit score or debt collection risk
Immediate cash on the spot for gold, jewelry, electronics, and other items—no waiting period
Layaway service available with affordable 10% down payment for customers wanting to purchase on installment
Wide variety of merchandise bought and sold, not limited to jewelry; buys 'almost anything of value'
Publically traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) suggests regulatory oversight and institutional stability
Fast loan process specifically marketed for consumers needing cash urgently
cons: Pawn loans do not build credit history or report to credit bureaus, offering no credit-building benefit
Pledged items are forfeited permanently if loans are not repaid—customers lose property without recourse
Interest rates and fees vary by state regulation; website does not disclose specific APR or fee structures
Retail markup on merchandise sold can be substantial; true value-for-money depends on individual negotiations
No indication of financial counseling, budgeting assistance, or alternatives to pawn lending offered
best_for: Consumers with immediate emergency cash needs who cannot access traditional personal loans or credit
Individuals with items of value (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they can temporarily pledge for short-term loans
People seeking to purchase discounted retail merchandise (electronics, appliances, sporting goods) at pawn prices
Those in geographic areas with convenient FirstCash locations seeking fast, no-credit-check lending
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers with immediate cash needs who own items of value and lack access to traditional credit—those seeking non-recourse, no-credit-check lending with instant funding. The primary caveat is that pawn loans do not build credit, pledged items are permanently lost if not repaid, and the true cost (interest rates, fees, and retail markups) depends heavily on individual state regulations and store-level negotiations not disclosed on the website.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property (non-recourse)
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying with immediate cash payment
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Item appraisal and valuation for pawn collateral
Merchandise inventory search and store locator tool
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions (through AFF subsidiary)
Point-of-sale payment solutions for retail merchants
